ul.li: Overhead Control: Path selection costs < 5% total runtime.
Memory Safety: W^X policy enforced. Code cache is RW- during write, R-X during execution.
Thresholding: Default counter = 10k. Scaled based on loop nesting level.
Concurrency: JIT Compilation usually runs on a background thread in production (async).

g.title: Checks if native code address is already cached in the function metadata
1 cycle overhead using DEC + JNZ pattern. Threshold typically 10,000.
Constant Folding, Dead Store Elim, Strength Reduction
